sections.title: 1.1: Early quests, wintertodt and ardy cloak 1

content.text: Start as a female character, don't forget to make yourself an ironman before leaving tutorial island

additionalContent.text: Note: Female char is for Recruitment Drive quest

Modern alternative: The female-character requirement for Recruitment Drive was removed in November 2022 - Sir Leye can now be defeated by any character while unarmed (or with certain specific weapons). Pick whichever character you like.

content.text: Use every book and lamp on Herblore UNTIL 77 herb, after that they should be used on prayer (HCIM only), agility or RC, whichever you dislike the most
Use Authenticator AND 2-step verification on registered e-mail
As soon as you spawn, sell bronze dagger, sword, axe, wooden shield and shortbow to the general store
Buy a spade, start X marks the spot quest
Drop your runes and ask for more from the magic tutor, pick up your runes
Pick up every item spawn in the castle, including the ones in cellar, don't forget the cabbage
Fill a jug with water
Talk to the duke to start Rune mysteries quest
Go to the top of the castle, bank everything
Light the 4 logs until 15 Firemaking
After that fletch the same logs into 1000 arrow shafts
Bank at least 4 ashes
Bank 7 logs for later
Take out GP, Clue (x marks the spot), air talisman, spade, mind/air runes, bread and shrimp from the bank
Thieve men until 5 thieving

additionalContent.text: Note: HCIMs eat bread/shrimp, quickhop cabbages from basement if needed, normals can just suicide for hp
⚠ HCIM warning — see note above.

content.text: Dig up the clue north of bob's axes
Buy a steel axe

additionalContent.text: Note: Make sure the world is full stock, should cost 200gp

content.text: Start Restless ghost by talking to Father Aereck
Dig up the clue behind lumby castle
Kill a rat (safespot with wind strike) for its meat

additionalContent.text: Safespot location

content.text: Hug the fence and run west, make sure you always have at least 15 energy to get gap just incase you get attacked by anything
Pick up 5 swamp tar around the swamp cave entrance
Talk to Father Urhney to get the ghostspeak amulet, equip it
Take the air talisman to wizard tower
Run to draynor village
Dig the next clue for X marks the spot
Pick up 2 cheese at Aggie in Draynor village
Buy 5 wine from Fortunato, use as emergency food if needed
Dig up the casket at draynor pig pen
Finish the X marks the spot quest by talking to Veos

additionalContent.text: Note: Don't use the xp lamp on anything yet

content.text: Walk to rimmington, pick up 1 snape grass near crafting guild at the hobgoblins

additionalContent.text: Note: Make sure you have ~10 run energy for this so you can just quickly grab one and get out

content.text: Walk to Falador
Start The Knight's sword quest by talking to the squire
Minigame tele to Clan wars
Pick up 2 iron bars just northwest of Ferox

additionalContent.text: Map location

content.text: Recharge run energy using the pool of refreshment, then use the green portal to teleport to Castle wars
Walk to yanille, buy a pie dish at Yanille cooking shop
Walk to port Khazard, buy 1 swamp paste from the general store
Do Monk's friend
Get 35 woodcutting at oak trees and firemake the logs as you cut them

additionalContent.text: 2 Oaks just south of ardy zoo

content.text: Get 20 thieving with cake

additionalContent.text: Note: Bank 15 bread and ALL the normal cakes you get, drop chocolates

content.text: Steal silk until 25 thieving
Do Sheep herder
Take out GP, swamp paste and small fishing net
Do Sea slug, fish shrimp while doing quest for diary

additionalContent.text: Note: Don't drop quest reward oyster pearls, worth over 500gp in the general store

content.text: After the quest, buy however many sardine you can fit in your inventory from the fish shop in Witchaven
Sell your silk for 60gp each, keep 10 in bank for quests
You should have 10k GP at this point. Buy a Player-owned house
Use the xp lamp from X marks the spot on Construction
Buy 2 ropes, 5 vials, 30 balls of wool and 7 papyrus from ardy general store
Dig up clue hunter gloves and boots north of Ardy

additionalContent.text: Clue hunter location

content.text: Buy greenman's ale from Rasolo
Do Dwarf cannon until the part where you have to go to Ice mountain
Pick up 130 planks north of the Barb agility course
Do BA tutorial for minigame tele

additionalContent.text: Note: You can skip the tutorial nowadays but just make sure you have the teleport unlocked (attempt to minigame tele to BA)

content.text: Start Barcrawl miniquest
Do Waterfall quest until the part where you have to go to the gnome maze, remember to read the book
Walk to Gnome stronghold
Buy a drink from Blurberry for the Barcrawl miniquest
Buy these items from Heckel Funch (east of Blurberry): 1 pineapple, 1 orange, 2 lemons, 1 cocktail shaker, 1 cocktail glass, 1 Dwellberries, 1 bucket of milk, 1 chocolate dust
Buy 1000 bronze arrowheads (100/world for 1gp ea)

additionalContent.text: Note: The weapon shop is on 3rd floor south of the ladder. Shops restock gradually over time, so hop worlds to buy your full amount - ironmen have had separate shop stock from mains since 2014

content.text: Make the hangover cure for plague city quest
Walk to Ardy with rope, dwellberries, hangover cure
Do Plague city
Home tele to lumby and run north to Varrock east bank

additionalContent.text: Note: Equip ghostspeak amulet if you've banked it at some point

content.text: Complete Daddy's home miniquest
Sell the 8 bolts of cloth from the quest reward back to the sawmill
From sawmill buy 500 bronze nails
Minigame teleport to Clan wars, recharge energy and use the portal to Castle wars
Take steel axe and a tinderbox
Run south-west of castle wars, cut and firemake teak logs until 50 Firemaking

additionalContent.text: Teak location

content.text: Home tele, Lumby
Talk to the ghost for Restless ghost quest
Run to Draynor bank
Buy a chronicle and 2 teleport cards from Diango
While at Diango, buy a Rainbow scarf (120gp) as a warm-clothing item for Wintertodt

additionalContent.text: Note: Counts as warm clothing for Wintertodt (pair it with the Clue Hunter boots/gloves you dug up earlier). Optional: speak to Gilbert in the flower field SE of Barbarian Village to also unlock the free Rainbow jumper (claimed from Diango) - but you don't pass Barb Village until after Wintertodt, so the scarf alone is the practical pickup here.

content.text: Use the housetab and train construction with your planks, make bookcases until out of planks

additionalContent.text: Note: Use phials to un-note planks

content.text: Walk to port sarim, buy 1000 feathers from the fishing store

additionalContent.text: Note: Should just about have enough money, but if you can't afford all of them then it's not a big deal, point is to just get a few fletching levels before WT

content.text: While at Port Sarim, complete the Pandemonium quest (start with Will & Anne on the docks) to unlock the Sailing skill

additionalContent.text: Note: Zero requirements; grants 300 Sailing XP. You're already at Port Sarim here so it's a free pickup. Sailing isn't on the main critical path - see the optional Sailing Track for the rest of the questline and training.

content.text: Take the boat to Great Kourend
Make your way to Wintertodt

additionalContent.text: Note: Fletch all 1k bronze arrows while you walk. If you see wolves near wintertodt, you went the wrong way. Shouldn't get hit by anything on the way

content.text: Should now have 15 fletching and 20 construction as well, this will increase the xp you get in these skills from wintertodt
Do Wintertodt until 200k cash, get at least 22 fletching at wintertodt as well

additionalContent.text: Note: UPDATE (Oct 2024): The Warmth Meter system has replaced HP-based damage entirely. A 10 HP player and a 99 HP player now take identical warmth damage, so there is no longer any advantage to rushing Wintertodt at low HP. Wear 4 warm clothing items for optimal warmth (Clue Hunter boots/gloves + the Rainbow scarf from Diango in Draynor; Gilbert near Barbarian Village unlocks a free Rainbow jumper). Rejuvenation potions now restore 30% Warmth per dose so no external food is needed. Supply crates have been replaced by a Reward Cart with a Big-search option. Bruma Herbs no longer grant Farming XP. Do whatever method you want; solo, mass, fletching the logs. If you want, feel free to get 99 firemaking in one go

Modern alternative: The Warmth Meter (Oct 2024) removed the 10HP rushing advantage entirely. There is no longer any urgency to do Wintertodt before training HP. Focus on getting warm clothing (4 pieces) rather than low HP.

content.text: Home tele, Lumby
Drop runes and get more from mage tutor
Buy 3 buckets and 1 bucket pack from the general store
Walk north to Fred's farm
Kill a chicken with wind strike for it's meat at Fred's farm
Pick up egg north of Fred
Kill 1 cow calf for meat
Fill 3 buckets with milk

additionalContent.text: Note: Dairy cow is north of the windmill

content.text: Walk to Barbarian village (you can walk east of draynor manor by the river, don't walk around through falador or something like that)
Get ammo mould and the notes for Dwarf cannon (Ice mountain northwest of Barb village)
Use chronicle tele
Start Gertrude's cat, pick up doogle leaves, use the leaves on a sardine
Continue gertrude's cat, talk to the kids at Varrock centre
Talk to Romeo to start Romeo and Juliet quest
Start Demon slayer, get the 2 keys in Varrock
Talk to Reldo for the Knight's sword quest
Do Shield of Arrav on any visit to Varrock
Buy a fire staff
Buy a newspaper from Benny
Buy gloves and pink skirt from clothes shop
Buy a rotten tomato from the crate near the achievement diary guy
Get a drink for barcrawl at the bar south of Varrock fountain
Buy 4 beers from the same bar
Do museum for 9 Hunter and Slayer
Steal tea from the tea stall
Give the package to Aubury, talk to him again for the notes
Buy 100 fire runes, 300 earth and water, 4000 mind, 8000 airs
Walk to the pub north-east of Varrock
Get a drink for the barcrawl
Cut a dying tree at the sawmill and make 1 regular plank for diary tasks
Continue Gertrude's cat at lumberyard
Varrock east bank
Fill 1 inventory of buckets with water, bank them
Pick cadava berries and 16 redberries

additionalContent.text: Bush location

content.text: Mine 4 copper ore and 1 iron ore
Chronicle tele
Finish Gertrude's cat, raise it with the sardine you bought
Talk to juliet
Varrock west bank
Walk to Barbarian Village via Edgeville, buy bronze med helm
Pick up 1 cooked meat from the table and burn it on the fire in the bar
Safespot barbarians in the bar for 13 magic

additionalContent.text: Note: You can skip getting 13 mage here if you know how to safespot the first 2 forms of witch's house boss

content.text: Use the trees to safespot a bear for its meat south of mind altar
Get a drink from the Falador bar for Barcrawl
Buy 5 wizard mind bombs from the bar
Buy 8 woad leaves, offer 20gp to get 2 leaves
Bank
Do Witch's house

additionalContent.text: Note: Tank the first 2 phases on the north side of the shed and run to safespot when you need to eat. It's possible to safespot the first 2, but with fire strike you are in no real danger of dying with cakes

content.text: Do Druidic ritual
Buy 1 PACK of eyes of newt and pestle and mortar in Taverly
Minigame tele to Clan wars
House tab to Rimmington
Complete witch's potion, onion is just north of the town
Run to port sarim
Make redberry pie

additionalContent.text: Note: You can buy flour and redberries at port sarim food shop

content.text: Get a security book from the Security guard upstairs in port sarim jail for a diary task
Give the pie to Thurgo, and ask about Knight's sword
Go down the dungeon and mine 2 blurite ore, 1 is for falador diary
Use the falador teletab, talk to the squire and get the portrait from sir Vyvin's room
Use house tab and run back to thurgo for the sword, run back to Falador
Finish the Knight's sword quest
Complete Sleeping Giants quest (15 Smithing required, you have 29)

additionalContent.text: Note: Short quest that unlocks Giants' Foundry - a much better Smithing training method than superheating iron. Save your metal bars for Foundry rather than traditional smithing.

content.text: Home tele and go to al-kharid
Buy 50 thread, 3 needles and all of the moulds from the crafting shop
Start prince ali rescue and talk to Osman
Fish anchovies (small fish net) south of the Al-Kharid bank for a diary
Buy 1 inv of bronze bars for questing from shantay pass
Do the tourist trap

additionalContent.text: Note: PUT BOTH XP REWARDS ON AGILITY, HOLD SPACE SO YOU DON'T ACCIDENTALLY PUT ONE ON THIEVING
Safespot for the captain

content.text: Minigame tele to fish trawler
Cook whatever low level raw food you got from wintertodt for 15 cooking on the fire
Buy 10 buckets of slime
Buy 10 flour from general store
Buy buckets of sand and soda ash

additionalContent.text: Note: You only need to buy around 600 buckets of sand and 600 soda ash, rest of crafting will be done with other methods

content.text: Mine 15 clay south of Khazard
Fire strike imps west of the tower of life for all 4 beads
Do Fight arena
Do Tree gnome village, get Glarial's pebble on the way for Waterfall

additionalContent.text: Note: Safespot the khazard warlord, plenty of videos on youtube showing how to if you don't know

content.text: Use the spirit tree and go to battlefield of khazard
Run to ZMI bank and safespot the zamorak warrior until you get a rune scimitar

additionalContent.text: Note: Getting the scim is optional but it's not too rare and you're still getting mage xp. You can also buy a rune sword from champion's guild if you don't want to camp for the scimitar

content.text: Get a drink from Ardy bar for the barcrawl
Buy 4 compost pack from the Ardy farming shop
Train 42 magic at Moss giants near fishing guild

additionalContent.text: Note: Bury the bones

content.text: Do Hazeel cult
Get a drink for the barcrawl quest from brimhaven bar
Do Tribal totem

additionalContent.text: Note: Buy some swordfish and karambwans from the food shop where you start the quest at for some of the more difficult quests

content.text: Finish dwarf cannon
Drop runes outside glarial's tomb, get amulet and the urn
Finish waterfall
Minigame tele to fish trawler
Charter to port sarim
Go to Zeah and get 100 compost and saltpetre

additionalContent.text: Note: UPDATE: The Kourend favour system was completely removed in January 2024. All content previously gated behind favour is now freely accessible through skill levels, quests, or diary tasks. No need to earn any favour

content.text: While in the Kourend/Zeah region, complete Children of the Sun to unlock Varlamore

additionalContent.text: Note: No requirements. Unlocks Varlamore, home to a lot of ironman content used later: Mastering Mixology (Herblore), Vale Totems (Fletching), Calcified Rocks (Mining/Prayer), and the Varlamore questline (Twilight's Promise, Perilous Moons).

content.text: Train 42 thieving at the fruit stall in a house east of the hosidius marketplace, NOT the stall at the marketplace itself

additionalContent.text: Note: No favour required anymore. Use strange fruits for energy restoration, they won't last long but you can do a few quests with them

content.text: Home tele, Lumby
Do cook's assistant
Start RFD and watch the cutscene to unlock the bank chest
Make 5 soft clay
Buy 7 buckets of milk
Do sheep shearer
Pickpocket HAM members for a rusty sword

additionalContent.text: Note: If you get them, keep robes, opal and buttons

content.text: Pick up 12 onion at Fred's farm
Make 4 red, 4 blue, 5 yellow dye

additionalContent.text: Note: You can just use the ingredient on Aggie to skip all of the dialogue

content.text: Get the key imprint, wig and skin paste for Prince ali rescue
Do 1 lap of the agility course for a diary
Start Vampire slayer, get 3 garlic upstairs from the cupboard
Buy birdhouse seeds from Olivia, get as many as you can be bothered for now, if worlds are bought out then try later
Buy 20 teleports for chronicle
Finish Imp catcher
Finish Rune mysteries

additionalContent.text: Note: Teleport to Essence mines for a diary task

content.text: Get the Ghost's skull in the basement
Kill 5 chicken/wizards, give 25 bones for demon slayer key
Chronicle tele
Continue Romeo & Juliet, get cadava potion
Buy iron chainbody from Horvik
Walk north from Varrock to the Wilderness (level 4-7) and talk to the Mage of Zamorak to start the Abyss miniquest

additionalContent.text: Note: Requires Rune Mysteries to be completed. Head to the south edge of the Wilderness near the River Lum

content.text: Return to Varrock, talk to the Mage of Zamorak at the Chaos Temple to get the scrying orb, then visit Aubury's rune shop to use the ess mine teleport (scrying orb 1/3)
Finish demon slayer
Get the stake for vampire slayer from the blue moon inn
Finish romeo and juliet
Spirit tree to gnome stronghold
Use Brimstails to go to ess mines (scrying orb 2/3, make sure you have it with you)
Start Grand tree
Clan wars minigame tele, recharge energy and go to castle wars
Get a drink for barcrawl from Yanille pub
Buy 2 bird snares, 2 butterfly jars and a butterfly net from the hunter shop
Go to Hazelmere and continue the grand tree until you are at Karamja shipyard
From Karamja shipyard, charter to Karamja, Musa point
Take boat to Port Sarim
Get a drink from the port sarim bar for barcrawl
Start Pirate's treasure
Boat back to Karamja
Fish shrimp north of banana trees for diary
Get a drink for barcrawl from the bar south of the Karamja banana trees
Do Karamja and port sarim parts of the Pirate's treasure quest
Chronicle tele
Get pirate's message from Blue moon inn, you can drop it AFTER reading the message
Spirit tree to Gnome stronghold
Finish The Grand tree

additionalContent.text: Note: This should get you 43 mage, if you didn't get 43 then fire strike some gnome guards

content.text: Buy a premade blurb' sp, 4 vodka, pineapple chunks
Equip Gas mask
Spirit tree to ardy
Start biohazard, get the plague sample and 3 potions
Take the boat from Ardy docks to Rimmington
Get the touch paper from chemist and give the 3 potions to the guys outside
Take the boat back to Ardy
Visit Ardy ess mines, scrying orb 3/3

additionalContent.text: Note: If you didn't bank any breads when getting 25 thieving then buy 15 now from the cake stall owner. If you somehow didn't get any iron ore from wintertodt then mine 2 east of Ardy

content.text: Use mind bomb and camelot tele
Start Merlin's crystal and talk to Gawain and Lancelot
Buy candle, 2 fishing rods, lobster pot
Buy 15 pineapples from charters
Put pineapples into the compost bin
Buy 1 pack of normal compost and all farming tools, store everything in leprechaun
Start Fishing contest
Kill Mordred and get bat bones/black candle for Merlin's crystal

additionalContent.text: Note: Talk to Sherlock and pick 5 flax for diaries

content.text: Do Murder mystery
Get a drink from Seers' bar for the barcrawl
Finish Fishing contest
Go under the mountain and speak to Lady of the lake in Taverly
Do Doric's quest
Finish Pirate's Treasure
Make 5 molten glass
Do Black knight's fortress
Do Recruitment drive
Run south to Port sarim
Trade Sarah's farming shop for a falador diary task
Buy a black wizards hat from Betty at port sarim magic store
Port Sarim jewellery store, give the bread to the beggar to get the excalibur
Minigame tele to clan wars, recharge energy and go to castle wars
Hop worlds for super antipoison(1), decant them until you have like 6 full pots
Do the Observatory quest
HOME TELE, Lumby
Finish The Restless ghost
Start the Lost tribe, do until you need to go to Varrock

additionalContent.text: Modern alternative: Goblin Diplomacy is now required before starting The Lost Tribe. Skip this step and steps 256/279 — instead, complete Goblin Diplomacy at step 278 first, then do The Lost Tribe entirely afterward (Lumbridge → Varrock → Goblin Village → Lumbridge). The extra travel is unavoidable but the guide is otherwise unaffected.

content.text: Teleport to Varrock
Continue Lost tribe until you need to go to the goblin village
Buy priest robes (keep these after quest), boots, gloves
Finish abyss miniquest
Train Runecraft to 10, then complete Temple of the Eye quest to unlock Guardians of the Rift

additionalContent.text: Note: GOTR is a massive improvement for RC training on ironmen. The quest gives ~5k Runecraft XP on completion (~9k including in-quest XP). GOTR provides runes, talismans, and the Raiments of the Eye set for bonus runes. This makes RC no longer need to be your lowest skill for Tears of Guthix.

content.text: Get the magic words for Merlin's crystal at the altar
Continue Biohazard
Do the Digsite quest
Chronicle tele and start Dragon slayer at champion's guild
Use the G.E spirit tree and go to battlefield of khazard
Finish Biohazard
Finish off Ardy easy tasks, and get the cloak

additionalContent.text: Note: Use lamp on agility. Not worth holding on to it, we won't be 30herb for a long time still and 2.5k xp isn't that much anyway

content.text: Trade cat for 200 death runes
Chronicle tele and buy a new kitten
Cloak tele back to Ardy
Do Jungle potion

additionalContent.text: Note: Bring a small fish net with u and fish ~100 karambwanji for your kittens, BE CAREFUL of aggressive NPCs

content.text: Do Shilo village

additionalContent.text: Note: HCIM; Buy a few karambwans and swordfish from brimhaven food store
⚠ HCIM warning — see note above.

content.text: Teleport to Camelot
Finish Merlin's crystal
Start Holy grail and talk to Merlin
Get boots of lightness

additionalContent.text: Note: Play the Church organ in the Seers' Village church for diary task

content.text: Do Elemental workshop 1
Buy 1 inv of stew from the Seers bar
Falador teleport
Do Goblin diplomacy
Continue Lost tribe
Home tele, Lumby
Finish Lost tribe
Go through the gate to Al-Kharid
Start the Feud at Ali Morrisane
From Ali Morrisane, buy the desert disguise for The Feud quest
Smelt the 5 silver, make a sickle and unstrung holy symbol, keep 3 bars
Give the key imprint and bronze bar to Osman for Prince ali rescue quest
Do the Feud

additionalContent.text: Note: HCIM; if you're scared of going to mage bank, unlock the rune shop
⚠ HCIM warning — see note above.

content.text: Blackjack until 50 thieving, you can buy wines from the bar to use as food

additionalContent.text: Modern alternative: Stealing Artefacts in Port Piscarilius is a viable alternative to blackjacking from 49 Thieving (~130-200k XP/hr, no favour needed since Jan 2024). Alternatively, Stealing Valuables in Varlamore is available at 50 Thieving and provides 70-105k XP/hr plus 90-150k GP/hr - less XP but great cash generation with lower click intensity.

content.text: IF you're planning on 3-tick fishing then home tele to lumby and pick up 15+ swamp tar now
Ardy cloak tele and take the boat from Ardy to brimhaven
Take the cart to Shilo Village
Cut uncut gems until level 32 crafting
Buy 20k feathers from shilo village fishing shop
Get 58 fishing with trout and salmon

additionalContent.text: Note: Bank the fish for cooking xp. You can pretty easily grow cats while doing this fishing grind since you can just feed it the fish you fish. I recommend raising 10 cats for death runes in total, after that it's up to you if you can be bothered

content.text: Minigame tele to Burthrope games' room
Cook all of your trout, don't cook salmon yet
Minigame tele to Barb assault
Get 50 agility from barb fishing, should be at 74 fishing

additionalContent.text: Note: You can feed caviar and roe to kitten, bring a knife to cut the fish. I honestly can't recommend any other way to train to 50 agi than fishing

content.text: Now that you're 74 Fishing, do a few Tempoross kills for the Fish Barrel and Spirit Flakes

additionalContent.text: Note: Tempoross is fought at Tempoross Cove, reached by boat from the Ruins of Unkah in the southern desert (NOT Al Kharid); or use the Fishing minigame teleport. Rewards: Fish Barrel (extra fish storage), Tackle Box, and Spirit Flakes (50% chance of an extra fish, no extra XP). Very valuable for ironman fishing efficiency - camp until you get the Fish Barrel at minimum.

content.text: After 50 agility, minigame tele to Burthrope
Do the rogue's den minigame for full rogue outfit

additionalContent.text: Note: Cook the salmon to regen run energy after every time you finish 1 attempt of the minigame. Buy 50 lockpicks while you're here

content.text: Equip the set and go back to blackjacking until you have 2.4m GP (around 83 thieving)

additionalContent.text: Note: If you really just can't stand thieving, you could go do LMS and sell rune arrows to a shop for your GP, but you don't get any XP from that so that's why I don't really recommend it. 75 Thieving is needed for all hard diaries so at least get that before going LMS

content.text: Carpet back to Shantay pass
If you got any cosmic runes from moss giants, or unlocked Ali's rune shop then make 1 or 2 dueling rings now to speed up next 2 quests
Start the Golem

additionalContent.text: Note: START ELEMENTAL WORKSHOP 2 BY READING THE BOOK WHILE AT DIGSITE, keep the 2 items in bank

content.text: Finish The Golem, get the gems with chisel and hammer

additionalContent.text: Note: You can cut the Uzer teak tree, mine 5 clay and catch a golden warbler bird near the desert phoenix for diaries during the quest

content.text: Do Shadow of the storm (should have priest gown and black wizard hat in bank as your black items)

additionalContent.text: Note: 10K reward on RANGED. Flinch the demon with rune scimitar, just switch to darklight for the last hit. If you didn't get r scim while training mage, go buy a rune sword from champions guild. Make an attack potion for the fight, speeds it up slightly
Use the west torch as your safespot

content.text: Go to Edgeville and talk to Oziach to continue Dragon slayer
Go to mage bank and buy 6k nats, all of the cosmics you can get while buying nats and 10 law runes each world up to 300 laws

additionalContent.text: Note: HCIM can buy them from ali morrisane if you don't wanna risk mage bank, although they're more expensive
⚠ HCIM warning — see note above.

content.text: Teleport to Falador
Get 2 buckets of sap from this tree near falador east bank

additionalContent.text: Tree location

content.text: Buy addy and rune picks from the pickaxe shop in the mines
Complete Varrock easy diary for the armour, makes next step a bit faster

additionalContent.text: Note: You can get the kudos requirement by talking to historian Minas on the 2nd floor. Use the museum lamps on herblore. Still not 30 herb, use diary lamp on agility

content.text: Buy a Celestial Ring from Dusuri's Star Shop in Falador (2,000 stardust) for a +4 invisible Mining boost

additionalContent.text: Note: Mine Shooting Stars (they land randomly across Gielinor - use the telescope in your POH or a star-hunting CC) for stardust, then buy the ring at Dusuri's Star Shop. The +4 Mining boost applies whether or not the ring is charged; charging it with stardust adds a separate 1/10 chance of an extra ore (up to adamantite).

content.text: Mine 2300 iron ore at ardy monastery, superheat them while walking to Ardy bank and tele back with ardy cloak

additionalContent.text: Note: 3 ticking makes this a lot faster if you can be bothered. Do medium clues if you get any from mining, might get a yew bow from reward (Comp bow works too, for temple of ikov). There are plenty of ways to get your magic up, i just like this since you get mining, smithing and later fletching xp as well. Don't smith the bars into anything yet
Modern alternative: Consider using Giants' Foundry (from Sleeping Giants quest) for Smithing XP instead of traditional methods. It is significantly more XP/bar and provides Smithing-related rewards.

content.text: Buy a bronze sword from Varrock sword shop (for Horror from the deep quest)
Smith 3 bronze wire
Buy an oak longbow and a regular shortbow from Lowe
Start Priest in peril
Buy 400 steel nails at the sawmill, if every world is bought out then don't bother
Start Rag and bone man on the way to the temple
Do priest in peril
Do Nature spirit

additionalContent.text: Note: After quest, restore prayer at the grotto for a diary task

content.text: Buy 1 raw shark from Canifis food shop
Do Creature of Fenkenstrain

additionalContent.text: Note: Use port Phasmatys furnace, you should have slime in bank, use it to get 5 ecto-tokens

content.text: Use Chronicle tele
Go champion's guild and continue Dragon slayer, ask every question

additionalContent.text: Note: Buy a coif, green dhide chaps and vambs

content.text: Kill the nearby ram, bear and unicorn for their bones (Rag and bone man quest)
Camelot tele
Kill a giant bat (Rag and bone man) south west of Catherby
Do Elemental workshop 2

additionalContent.text: Note: Kill one of each elementals for a diary task

content.text: Lumby
Get anti-dragon shield from the duke
Kill a goblin for the bone for rag and bone man
Get big frog leg (you need to go in to the caves), giant rat bone (both for rag and bone man)
Start Lost city
Go to Draynor manor
Do Ernest the chicken, finish vampire slayer
Dig up the skull for fairytale part 1 while you're in the area to save some time later
Bank at Draynor
Talk to the high priest for Holy grail
Get at least 5 Dramen branches, make 2 staffs
Finish Lost city
Start Fairytale part 1

additionalContent.text: Note: The quest guide on os.rs.wiki lists where to get the 3 random items. If you get nature tally req, go to abyss with inv of food and kill leeches. Make sure you trap them so only 1 attacks

content.text: Flinch Tanglefoot in this spot

additionalContent.text: Tanglefoot flinch spot

content.text: Talk to martin to start Fairytale2
Buy 35 jugs of vinegar
Buy 1 marigold seed, 3 cabbage seeds, 3 onion seeds from Draynor seed market
Rescue prince ali from the jail
While you wait for Martin's crops for FT2, tele to Lumby
Start Evil Dave subquest for RFD

additionalContent.text: Note: If you don't have a cat then raise one now

content.text: Kill 2 cows and make 1 soft, 1 hard leather
Smelt 1 inv of gold, should have from wintertodt

additionalContent.text: Note: If you didn't get any gold then go mine some from the alkharid mine. Make 1 recoil ring, 10 games necks and the rest into dueling rings. From this point just use clan wars tele as your energy recharge before teleporting to a new location

content.text: Speak to Martin for Fairytale 2
Go unlock fairy rings at Zanaris

additionalContent.text: Note: Travel to these fairy rings to complete diary tasks: BIS, AIR, ALS, CIR, DIS

content.text: Tele to POH and do Melzar's maze (Dragon slayer quest)
Walk to port Sarim jail and telegrab 2nd map piece for Dragon Slayer
Buy and repair the ship (dragon slayer)
Tele to Fally
Make unfired bowl at barb village

additionalContent.text: Note: Equip your anti-dragon shield and recoil ring now so you don't forget it later

content.text: Talk to the oracle
Get the 3rd map piece for dragon slayer
Tele to Lumby
Get Ned as your captain for dragon slayer

additionalContent.text: Note: Make sure you have the anti-dragon shield and recoil ring equipped

content.text: Go to Crandor and open the shortcut to Karamja volcano

additionalContent.text: Note: Bring swordfish/karambwans as your food. As soon as you go climb down from Crandor, climb back up for karamja medium diary task

content.text: Kill Elvarg, you can do as many trips as you want

additionalContent.text: Note: There are flinch spots in the room, but honestly you shouldn't have any trouble with this fight. Step under Elvarg when eating

content.text: Finish dragon slayer and buy a green d'hide top from Oziach
Wear gloves and pick up 5 nettles at the yews
Make the stew for Evil Dave while you're at Edgeville

additionalContent.text: Note: If you don't have a cat then just leave for later, don't bother doing this with a kitten

content.text: Tele to Lumby
Fill a bowl with water, put nettles in it and use it on a range (This is for ghosts ahoy quest)
Finish Evil Dave subquest
Do Death to the Dorgeshuun. While getting the robes, keep buttons (If you didn't get them while getting the rusty sword)
Buy dorgeshuun crossbow and 4000 bone bolts
Buy a Bullseye lantern (empty) from Miltog at the market in Dorgeshkaan
Use swamp tar on the lamp still next to Miltog, use your empty lantern on the still to fill it
Finish Holy grail

additionalContent.text: Note: Diary steps near Galahad's house: Get a cup of tea from him, cross the log, mine coal at the coal trucks. Diary steps at Karamja: Rope swing to the moss giant island, mine gold at the horse shoe mine

content.text: Do Horror from the deep quest

additionalContent.text: Note: Complete a lap of Barb agility course for a diary. Just mage the dagannoth and hide when it's weak to melee and range. Turn your run off so you don't get meleed. Use proper food like swordfish and karambwans

content.text: Do Turael slayer with dorg cbow until 37 Range and 18 slayer

additionalContent.text: Note: Use Turael, every 10th task should be done with the highest level slayer master you can use. Even though we are using Turael, the goal is to get slayer xp so you should always kill monsters with higher hp, for example on bird tasks kill terrorbirds. Vannaka has too many bad tasks so I think this is overall better

content.text: Complete Twilight's Promise quest (requires Children of the Sun; ~40 combat recommended)

additionalContent.text: Note: Unlocks the Quetzal Transport system for fast travel across Varlamore. Also required for later Varlamore quests including Perilous Moons.

content.text: Try Calcified Rocks for Mining XP plus bankable Prayer shards (41 Mining, Varlamore access)

additionalContent.text: Note: Calcified Rocks (Cam Torum mine) require 41 Mining and yield blessed bone shards. Offering shards at the libation bowl in the Teomat gives ~5-6 Prayer XP each and requires 30 Prayer. Shards are stackable and bankable - accumulate them while Mining. Sun-kissed bones (from Hunter Rumours and other Varlamore activities) break into 45 shards each (225 Prayer XP). This shard ecosystem provides safe, bankable Prayer training that integrates with Mining and Hunter progression, reducing reliance on Wilderness altars.

content.text: Kill tree spirits with fire strike for a mithril axe AND either another mith axe, addy axe or a rune axe, whichever is first

additionalContent.text: Note: The 2nd axe is for actual WC training, not worth the time camping for rune one unless u get lucky since u can just buy one at 60wc

content.text: Do Animal magnetism
Buy mithril platebody from Horvik in Varrock
Buy mithril platelegs from al-kharid
Do Spirits of the Elid quest

additionalContent.text: Note: You can use the mithril armor for tanking the golems, or flinch them if you're taking too much damage

content.text: Do the Underground pass quest

additionalContent.text: Note: Use the mithril armour for this quest. HCIM; While this quest might seem like a dangerous one without overheads, it's honestly not. You can trap the paladins behind each other same way as the captain from the tourist trap quest. For the spider, there are 2 skeletons on the east wall, stand between them and then mage the big one with earth blast. Sometimes the little ones attack you but just run a bit north and then back to the same spot, they'll get stuck
⚠ HCIM warning — see note above.
Video of completing the quest with same combat stats

content.text: Upgrade the iban staff
Get 50 attack doing more Turael slayer, remember to get every 10th task from Vannaka

additionalContent.text: Note: If you get a task from Vannaka that you really can't do without melee protect then go kill sand crabs until 50 attack

content.text: Make an amulet of magic
Kill blue dragons with iban's blast for 43 prayer

additionalContent.text: Note: We don't have the agility level for shortcut yet so don't bother banking the hides, not worth doing twice as many trips. Add 2400 xp to your current prayer xp and calculate how many bones you need, level 43 requires 50339xp and 1 bone is 288xp with ectofuntus (2.4k pray xp is from ghosts ahoy quest which will be completed before using the bones). Regular ironmen can use the wildy altar if you want to, but either way it's only around 85 bones with ecto so do whichever method. Get at least 1 extra dragon bone on top of 43 prayer, required for the Watchtower quest

content.text: Minigame tele to fishing trawler
Buy however many buckets of slime you need for the bones
Equip Ghostspeak amulet
If you didn't prepare the nettle water earlier, do it now
Make sure you have all ghosts ahoy items
Charter to port Phasmatys
Start ghosts ahoy
Grind 9 d bones and offer them, get ecto tokens
Finish ghosts ahoy
Grind the rest of your bones to get 43 prayer
Do Monkey madness, focus the reward on attack and defense
Do Wanted! quest
Get 40 slayer, Turael slay

additionalContent.text: Note: Reminder once again, every 10th task from Vannaka (or from chaeldar if you're already 70cb, Konar if 75cb). Prayer flicking is recommended, but Turael tasks are pretty easy so it's not mandatory. Train range to 40 first and then start training Attack

content.text: Do Shades of morton quest

additionalContent.text: Note: IF there's no one else to help you then this quest can be left until later assuming you used the museum lamps on herblore earlier. Take the book to the apothecary in Varrock for some free herb xp

content.text: Get 25 herblore if you don't have yet
Do Heroes' quest
Do Fremennik trials
Do Throne of miscellania
Do Royal Trouble
Put at least 750k gp to kingdom, set it on 10 maples and 5 herbs

additionalContent.text: Note: We'll be using kingdom for only 7 days at the start, make sure you go get 100% back every day for maximum yield

Modern alternative: Set Kingdom to 10 Hardwood (Teak or Mahogany) + 5 Herbs instead of Maples. Hardwood feeds Construction training and Sailing construction. Maples are much less useful now with many better Fletching methods available.

content.text: Go back to blackjacking for a few hours and put more money to kingdom so that it doesn't drop below 750k

additionalContent.text: Note: Remember to wear rogue outfit. In total you need 525k on top of the 750k to get all you need from kingdom for now

content.text: Clean finds at the museum until you've found all 5 of the items you can get for kudos AND the ruby necklace
Do Bone Voyage quest
Set up your first bird houses

additionalContent.text: Video by Alkan showing you how to start

content.text: Do birdhouse runs every 50mins

additionalContent.text: Note: Don't bother waking up every 50mins to do a run, but while playing you should at least try to be consistent with them

content.text: AFTER your first hunter levels from a birdhouse run, RC should be your lowest skill
Do Tears of guthix quest, do the minigame weekly it's very worth it

additionalContent.text: Note: RC should always be your lowest skill when you do this, at least for a very long time

content.text: Start The Giant Dwarf quest to unlock Keldagrim
Buy 2 inventories of gold ore from the blast furnace shop
Go Edgeville furnace and make plenty of digsite pendants
Make molten glass and cut gems until 45 crafting. You'll need 45 for maple birdhouse when you get the 44 hunter

additionalContent.text: Note: Make all of the molten glass first and if needed, craft fishbowls until 45

content.text: Buy more seeds from Olivia at Draynor for birdhouses if needed

additionalContent.text: Note: Later on the farming guild shop is usually better so don't bother spending hours at Olivia, just get like 1-2k for now

content.text: Move your house to Pollnivneach so you can do a birdhouse run every 50 mins and quickly get back to blackjacking

additionalContent.text: Note: Entering your POH portal from Pollnivneach portal is a diary task

content.text: Get 88 thieving with blackjacking, should get you about 1.4m GP

additionalContent.text: Note: Again, LMS can be done instead if you really hate blackjacking. If u want something to AFK during this grind, i'd heavily recommend ammonite crabs to get 60 attack and then focus on either strength with D Scim or range with bone cbow. If you really like blackjacking then feel free to get higher than 88, the extra money should be used for keeping kingdom running for longer, switch to 10herbs and 5maples in that case

Modern alternative: Rushing 88+ Thieving early isn't macroefficient according to the OSRS Wiki ironman money-making guide. Consider milestone Thieving instead: get the GP you need for kingdom and key unlocks (75 for hard diaries), then move on. The time saved can go toward quests and combat progression which compound more. Stealing Valuables in Varlamore provides steady cash later without the high click intensity. For the AFK melee suggestion in the note: Scurrius (Jan 2024, Varrock Sewers) now beats crabs for active mid-level melee training - crabs remain the truly AFK option.

content.text: REMINDER to take out GP from kingdom after the 7th day. This thieving grind could take some people 1 day and for others multiple days so it's up to you to keep track of it. You should have 6.2k maples from kingdom when you stop using it
Thieve master farmers for a couple of hours just to get some low level seeds to start farming with, mainly harralanders

additionalContent.text: Note: Remember rogue outfit. I recommend thieving in Draynor since the bank is right next to the farmer to grab some food quickly. There is an anti-bot feature for master farmers where the herb seed table scales with your Farming level - you get noticeably fewer good herb seeds below 75 Farming, with rates continuing to improve up to 85. Those seeds aren't important right now so as long as you can get other seeds in good amounts, that's all that matters

content.text: Get 100% hosidius favour, should have 300 compost in bank

additionalContent.text: Note: At 45% do mess hall until 100%

Modern alternative: The Kourend favour system was removed in January 2024, so this step is no longer possible — skip it entirely. All Hosidius content (fruit stalls, farming patches, Tithe Farm, the Mess) is freely accessible now. The Mess still exists as optional Cooking training if you want it.

content.text: Buy pineapples for supercompost from charter ships
Put 15 pineapples into each of the compost bins at the allotment patches, remember to close the bin

additionalContent.text: Note: Don't do Hosidius patch yet, we'll be doing construction soon which requires house in Rimmington so it's not worth switching house to Kourend for 1 compost run and then switching back

content.text: Buy ~200 chocolate from the grand tree food shop, don't buy too much since it's faster later from the RFD chest
Make energy pots, should have some harralanders from kingdom if it's been over a day since you did the quest
Camelot tele
Plant barley seeds at the hops patch northwest of Seers, pay the farmer 3 normal compost to look after them
Minigame tele to blast furnace
Do the Giant Dwarf quest

additionalContent.text: Note: If you need more rubies or emeralds, the gem stall in keldagrim is usually stocked

content.text: These next 2 quests have times where you have to wait for stuff to happen, smith iron dart tips while you wait
Forgettable tale of a drunken dwarf quest

additionalContent.text: Note: There's an anvil near the bank in keldagrim. Your barley will be ready when you need it, use it on a range to get the barley malt. Plant jute seeds after harvesting the barley for a diary task, don't need to compost or protect them. Do not waste the 2 dwarven stout(m) that you get as the reward!

content.text: Garden of tranquility quest
Start Enlightened journey quest

additionalContent.text: Note: You need 6 willow branches for the falador diary on top of the 12 needed for the quest so get those as well

content.text: While waiting for the willow trees to grow, do these steps:
Do Eyes of glouphrie and Tower of life

additionalContent.text: Note: Bring a raw chicken and a raw swordfish to kill a Swordchick for Ardy diary after Tower of life

content.text: Smith the rest of your iron dart tips, leave 20 bars for quests
Mine Volcanic ash for ultracompost, get like 2k so you don't have to constantly come back to mine more
Do a farm run of limpwurts, harralanders and ultracompost

additionalContent.text: Note: Store 15 supercompost in leprechaun for a quest, make the rest into ultras. Use volcanic ash on the full bin rather than individual buckets of supercompost. I'm not gonna be mentioning farm runs anymore, just do them whenever. Always use ultra compost on herbs, for limps i'd just use normal compost because the seeds are so easy to get

content.text: Do Temple of Ikov quest

additionalContent.text: Note: Start fletching iron darts while you run around doing quests. If you haven't got a yew bow from medium clues that you may have got from skilling, get a yew long from young implings in puro-puro, find a spawn point and catch them as they spawn

content.text: Finish Enlightened journey and unlock Varrock and Castle wars balloons

additionalContent.text: Note: While unlikely, it's possible that you didn't get yew logs from wintertodt to unlock castle wars, in that case you'll just have to run between Varrock east bank and the sawmill instead of doing the method explained just below

content.text: Construction method: Make 10+ dueling rings, equip whichever axe you got from tree spirits earlier
Start at Castle wars, cut 65 willow logs and deposit them to the log storage next to the balloon
Balloon to Varrock, cut full inventory of oak logs and turn them into planks at the sawmill

additionalContent.text: Note: 3-ticking recommended especially if u didn't get a lucky rune axe
3 Oaks just next to the balloon

content.text: Teleport to Castle wars, repeat until you have 50 construction banked

additionalContent.text: Note: You can use minigame tele every 20mins if you want to save a ring charge. 1500 planks not including Wintertodt XP, check xp calculator if you want to get the exact amount

content.text: Get 50 construction, un-note with Phials at Rimmington general store

additionalContent.text: Note: lvl 22-33, oak dining table in the dining room. lvl 33-50, oak larder in the kitchen
Modern alternative: Mahogany Homes is available from level 1 Construction and provides ~3x more XP per plank than traditional methods. Use it if you prefer a less click-intensive approach.

content.text: Move your house to kourend now for farm patch
Start doing daily tree runs from now on with the seeds you get from birdhouses and later farming contracts as well

Do these quests while fletching iron darts: Big chompy bird hunt, Rag and bone man (first part, should have all bones in bank already), Family crest (get goldsmith gauntlets after quest is done), Start Legend's quest (Get vanilla pod for RFD), Death plateau, Troll Stronghold
I'll assume you have fletched all of them now, if you haven't then finish the rest of them during next step underwater
Go to the small island at fossil island with the bank, where you dive to seaweed patches
Consider Vale Totems for Fletching training (20+ Fletching, Varlamore access)

additionalContent.text: Note: Vale Totems in Varlamore provide 100-420k Fletching XP/hr depending on level, significantly faster than traditional methods. Available with Children of the Sun completed.

content.text: While underwater: Fletch maple shortbows (u) until 55 fletching

additionalContent.text: Note: Make sure you fletch all of the darts first. The goal here is to pick up the seaweed spores that spawn every now and then. The spores can spawn north of the anchor so make sure you're checking the minimap and not just your item overlay. Plant seaweed after you get your first 2 spores. You will get a weight warning but you can just ignore that, it makes no difference unless you go to the deep water

content.text: Fletch all of your maple logs into maple longbows (u)

additionalContent.text: Note: Make sure to leave some logs for birdhouses

content.text: Cut all of your uncut gems
If u have any molten glass left, blow all of it into unpowered orbs, make 2 lantern lenses as well
Do seaweed farming every time u do birdhouse run from now on, very important!
Buy 2800 gold ore from blast furnace ore shop, 1 inv per world

additionalContent.text: Note: Don't use energy pots for this or the actual smithing part, only run with empty inventory

content.text: Get 60 smithing, remember to wear goldsmith gauntlets
Go to Edgeville
Craft the gold bars into gold BRACELETS, leave like 30 bars for teleport jewellery if you need to make more

additionalContent.text: Note: Reminder to buy rubies from either keldagrim or kourend castle gem stalls if you run out. The reason we are doing bracelets instead of amulets is the extra 120gp per high alch, which is worth more than 5xp

content.text: If you have 60 magic, get mage arena cape while you're here anyway
Buy another 5k nats, get some cosmics too if you need more

additionalContent.text: Note: HCIM; if scared, you should still have enough nats to get 63mage with alching, and then you can boost to get into wizard guild
⚠ HCIM warning — see note above.

content.text: Do agility until full graceful, 50-60 at Canifis, 60+ at Seers

additionalContent.text: Note: Alch your gold bracelets and maple bows(u) while doing agility. Loot kingdom and fletch more longbows to alch if you run out. If you're still getting more maples from kingdom then it's not worth doing agility if u run out of alchs, just move to the next step and come back to agility few days later. Make sure you keep at least 500 logs for birdhouses!

Modern alternative: Run energy was reworked in Jan 2025: lower-level regeneration is significantly better and energy drains slower in all scenarios. Full Graceful is less urgent now. Consider getting early Agility breakpoints for quests/diaries and collecting marks opportunistically, then coming back for full Graceful when it aligns with stamina production or long travel grinds.

content.text: Consider the Colossal Wyrm Agility Course as an AFK-ish alternative (requires Varlamore access)

additionalContent.text: Note: The Colossal Wyrm course in Varlamore offers competitive Agility XP with lower click intensity than rooftops. Amylase pack cost was halved (200 → 100 termites) in Oct 2024, improving marks-of-grace equivalent rate. Also passively generates small amounts of blessed bone shards for Prayer.

content.text: If you want a break from agility, fish 3k raw karambwans. Banking at Zanaris bank is your best option for now
Should get to 70+ mage by the time you're done with agility for now
Kingdom reminder! If u haven't already, take out all gp from the coffers after the 7th day, total 6.2k maples
Do the Regicide quest

additionalContent.text: Note: Pick up a few whiteberries just north of the elf tracker

content.text: Do Hand in the sand quest
Do all of the RFD subquests

additionalContent.text: Note: If u didn't fish the 3k karambwans during agility for cook xp, u can leave awowogei's quest until later

content.text: Buy a bunch of chocolate dust from the chest and make energy pots
Plant some Toadflax seeds, agility potion is needed soon for a quest

additionalContent.text: Note: If you don't have toadflax seed for some reason, you can do brimhaven agility arena and buy toadflax with the vouchers you earn (3 vouchers each)

content.text: Make a mithril grapple

Do these quests for QP and diaries: A soul's bane, Another slice of H.A.M, Icthlarin's little helper, Contact!, In search of the Myreque, In aid of the Myreque, Eagles' peak, Enakhra's Lament, Rat catchers, Olaf's quest, Between a rock, Tai bwo wannai trio, Zogre flesh eater

additionalContent.text: Note: Contact! (needs Icthlarin's Little Helper + Prince Ali Rescue) is required for Beneath Cursed Sands below. Eagles' Peak is required for At First Light.

content.text: Complete Perilous Moons quest when you reach 48 Slayer (requires Twilight's Promise done)

additionalContent.text: Note: Gives ~40k Slayer XP reward. Unlocks access to the Blood Moon, Blue Moon, and Eclipse Moon bosses. Blood Moon drops the Blood Moon armour set (melee) which is very strong for mid-game.

content.text: Complete Defender of Varrock quest (55 Smithing, 52 Hunter + prerequisites)

additionalContent.text: Note: Gives ~35k XP (15k Smithing, 15k Hunter, 5k antique lamp). Also a prerequisite for While Guthix Sleeps, one of the best quests for ironmen. Unlocks the Zombie Axe at 65 Attack.

content.text: Complete Beneath Cursed Sands when you reach 62 Agility (requires Contact! done)

additionalContent.text: Note: Unlocks the Keris Partisan weapon and access to Tombs of Amascut (ToA). ToA is one of the best sources of gear upgrades for ironmen, providing Osmumten's Fang, Lightbearer, and more.

content.text: Complete At First Light quest (now that Eagles' Peak is done; also needs 46 Hunter, 30 Herblore, 27 Construction)

additionalContent.text: Note: Moved here because it requires Eagles' Peak (completed in the quest batch above). Unlocks the Hunter Guild and the Rumours hunter training system - the best Hunter training AND a supply engine (loot sacks give herbs, seeds, nests, bones, blessed bone shards). Integrate Rumours alongside birdhouse runs.

content.text: Rum deal (Req 42 slayer, you should be close to it. Get a task from Mazchna for Mory diary if you don't have one)

additionalContent.text: Note: For the 47 prayer req, you can use the ancient mace spec to boost

content.text: Cabin fever
One small favour
Watchtower quest
Do all easy and medium diaries

additionalContent.text: Note: Kourend diaries can be left undone, I dont do them until I have Xerics tally from shamans and staminas for the quests. Wildy and fremmy mediums require higher slayer, leave those for when you go back to slayer. You probably don't have a crystal key for fally medium diary yet so leave that for later as well

content.text: For Lumby 50 range req I'd recommend ranging at pest control with bone cbow

additionalContent.text: Note: If you're not 70cb for intermediate boat then go do slayer now, train attack to 60 then defense until 70cb. May as well stay until you get 250pts for void bottoms, good mage def. Need 55 range eventually anyway for red chins

content.text: Do Slayer until 60 attack
Buy Dragon scim

additionalContent.text: Note: Normally I have recommended to also buy a Dragon battleaxe, but it's really just not needed anymore due to how easy it is to get kwuarms and limpwurts nowadays with farming contracts

content.text: Do Eadgar's ruse
Do My arm's big adventure
Do Desert Treasure

additionalContent.text: Note: If you didn't get magic logs from Wintertodt, go catch nature implings in puro-puro, you should have 58 hunter easily by now from birdhouses
Modern alternative: If you unlocked GOTR earlier, Runecraft no longer needs to be your lowest skill for Tears of Guthix. Redirect ToG to whichever skill you least enjoy training.

content.text: Finish RFD, buy B gloves

additionalContent.text: Note: Here's a video of me killing the bosses with stats from following this guide, not too difficult
Video of killing RFD bosses

content.text: Get autoweed perk from Tithe farm (if 54 farming), herb sack IMO isn't even worth getting nowadays with everything giving more herbs and seeds than you'd ever need
Start doing farming contracts as soon as you can do medium contracts, very important!! You can use garden pies to get mediums at 62farm, and hards at 82. Pies can be bought from Cooking guild
If you ever need something AFK to do, just go to ammonite crabs with either bone cbow if you want to catch less chins in the future, or melee them to speed up slayer

additionalContent.text: Modern alternative: Scurrius (Jan 2024, Varrock Sewers) beats crabs for mid-level melee if you're playing actively - better XP/hr plus rat bone weapons and useful drops. Crabs remain the pick when you actually want AFK.

content.text: Get 61 Crafting
Go to the desert quarry and mine sandstone for 1.2k buckets of sand

additionalContent.text: Note: Walk from the rocks to the grinder to maintain run energy if you're 3-ticking

content.text: Go to rogues' den and burn giant seaweed on the fire, 4 seaweed at a time
Make molten glass at Edgeville furnace
Blow glass lenses, might as well do it underwater again for more seaweed spores
Get 70 mining and do Lunar's diplomacy

additionalContent.text: Note: Only 60 mining is needed for now so you can do this in bits if you want to, but i'd recommend 70 for making friends with my arm (Req 72mining but u can boost with dwarven stout(m) which u should have in bank) and to complete fremmy hard diary very early for the herb patch shortcut. In my opinion the best way to do this is to fill the sandstone grinder with 25k buckets worth of sand to have it ready for later, bring 8 waterskins, drop them as they empty for inv space and then do a birdhouse run. Finish 70 with your favorite mining method

content.text: Get a helm of neitiznot
Get a fighter torso from BA
Strength amulet is as good as a glory ammy for melee slayer (sometimes even better) so just use that for now
Do slayer until 65 attack and 65 str, if you don't have them already
Get a dragon defender

additionalContent.text: Note: Train defense to 60 while getting defenders

content.text: Prioritize STR training during slayer, I like to go for 65/80/65 melee stats and from there just train each skill 5 levels before switching to the next
If you completed Defender of Varrock in section 1.5 and have 65 Attack, the Zombie Axe is available as a strong melee weapon

additionalContent.text: Note: Zombie Axe (65 Attack) - the broken zombie axe drops from Armoured Zombies in Zemouregal's Base (the dungeon from Defender of Varrock); repair it at an anvil with 70 Smithing. A strong slash weapon that bridges the gap before the Abyssal Whip.

content.text: Get 58 slayer, make sure you're consistent with all your farming and birdhouses

additionalContent.text: Note: Personally I like to do Turael point boosting until around 150 tasks, every 10th task from Konar just to get all the good unlocks and blocklist sorted before doing normal slayer, but you can do slayer however you like

content.text: I recommend doing hard clues, they're good gp/h at this point of the account. Train crafting for blue dhide if you get those steps using the superglass make lunar spell
Prioritize slayer points on: Superior slayer > Blocklist > Extend your favorite tasks > Slay ring > Slay helm > Garg smasher

additionalContent.text: Modern alternative: Updated priority: Bigger and Badder (superiors, 150pts) is the #1 unlock. Then extend good tasks and build your block list based on your assigned Slayer master. Use per-master block lists for efficiency.

content.text: At 58 slayer: Camp Cave horrors for mask
If you have around 65/80/65 melee stats now, do Making friends with my arm quest and make both of the basalt tele portals in your POH

additionalContent.text: Note: The quest can be done with lower stats, but the boss can be annoying if you're not hitting well

content.text: Do Fremmy hard diary, get 70 agility and make few agility pots to use the shortcut to speed up your herb runs even more, drink the boost before using the teleport to skip the shortcut
Do dream mentor and imbue your mask
Get crafting level for slayer rings at some point
Keep doing slayer until level 75

additionalContent.text: Note: If you want to boost brews from ToB for Song of the elves you can stop at around 70slay, whenever u have 70herb banked. You can go for a B ring during a dagannoth task if you want, 70def with full rune is decent for camping Rex

content.text: Do Mage arena 2
Get 77 herblore, you should have it banked by now if you've been farming, if you don't then just keep doing more slayer

additionalContent.text: Note: You can finish all the quests that give herb xp or lamps, some hard diaries can also be done

content.text: Get 70 agility if you didn't get it for the herb patch shortcut earlier
Cut and bank 2.2k teak logs at fossil island, from the farming patch teaks
Do Mahogany homes with teak planks for 70 construction
Finish 70 woodcutting with any method
Get 60 range with bone crossbow at pest control if you haven't already got 60
Get 70 smithing

additionalContent.text: Note: If you can't afford to do it all with gold, you can buy like 2k coal and 2k iron and make steel platebodies. Steel is a bit slower but you profit GP from it so it's still a decent method. If you don't care about rushing DS2 and Sote, just go do more slayer until you can afford to do 70 smithing with gold only

Modern alternative: Giants' Foundry (unlocked via Sleeping Giants at step 1.1.145a) supersedes steel platebodies entirely: 85-135k Smithing XP/hr depending on level, profitable rather than break-even, and it awards the Smiths' Uniform for bonus XP. Take your bars there instead.

content.text: Make botanical pies and +4 herblore boost for sara brews
Do Song of the elves

additionalContent.text: Note: If you don't have 80 magic yet for blitz, you could go do MTA for B2P, master wand and inf boots. Use blood blitz against Seren. If you go in with inventory full of brews and restores, it's basically impossible to fail the fight

content.text: Hunt 15k red chins at the Prif hunter area
Get range void from PC
Unlock MM2 chinning area and chin to at least 87 range

additionalContent.text: Note: At 70 range, if you're 100cb do western hard diary and upgrade to elite void

content.text: Do Dragon slayer 2
Start using kingdom again now that you'll be getting constant GP easily, put it on 10 teaks or mahogany, whichever you prefer to use for construction and 5 on herbs
Ending the guide here, you can pretty much do whatever you want from here
Moons of Peril: Farm Blue Moon boss first for its magic-oriented hybrid armour, then Blood Moon for the melee set (requires Perilous Moons quest)

additionalContent.text: Note: Blue Moon magic armour (+30 magic attack body, +22 legs) is needed as gear for Royal Titans. Blood Moon melee set is strong for Slayer. Prioritize Blue Moon first, then Blood Moon. Come back with Bowfa after CG if needed to finish the melee set.

content.text: Farm Royal Titans for Twinflame Staff, Deadeye and Mystic Vigour prayer scrolls (no quest required, duo recommended)

additionalContent.text: Note: Royal Titans is a duo boss accessible at ~90 combat with no quest requirements. Use Blue Moon magic armour for the fight. Priority drops: Fire/Ice element staff crown (1/75 each) for the Twinflame Staff (60 Magic; fires a second hit at 40% damage on elemental spells, excluding Strike/Surge; outperforms Trident of the Seas until ~92 Magic), Deadeye scroll (62 Prayer, +18% ranged attack/damage - replaces Eagle Eye), Mystic Vigour scroll (63 Prayer, +18% magic attack/defence +3% magic damage - replaces Mystic Might). These prayers help at Corrupted Gauntlet and all subsequent PvM. Can be done on a Fire Giant Slayer task for Slayer helm bonus.

content.text: By far the best thing to do next is to camp Corrupted Gauntlet until 2 enhanced weapon seeds to make both of the weapons and 6 armor seeds for full crystal
Phase 2 Complete: Post-Bowfa progression begins here

additionalContent.text: Note: With Bowfa (c) + Crystal armour, you now have one of the strongest ranged setups in the game. Deadeye and Mystic Vigour prayers from Royal Titans boost all combat going forward. The following steps outline the mid-to-late game gear progression.

content.text: Resume Slayer with Bowfa - push to 85+ Slayer for boss tasks and Abyssal Demons

additionalContent.text: Note: Bowfa makes many Slayer tasks extremely fast. Camp Abyssal Demons at 85 for the Abyssal Whip.

content.text: Do Mastering Mixology at 60+ Herblore (requires Children of the Sun)

additionalContent.text: Note: Mastering Mixology in Varlamore is a new Herblore training method that provides good XP rates and useful herblore-related rewards.

content.text: Start ToA at Entry Mode, push to 150 invocations for unique drops

additionalContent.text: Note: Tombs of Amascut is extremely ironman-friendly with scalable difficulty. Priority drops: Osmumten's Fang (best melee stab weapon), Lightbearer (doubles spec regen), Masori armour. Start at entry mode to learn, then push invocations up.

content.text: Farm ToA for Osmumten's Fang and Lightbearer as priority drops

additionalContent.text: Note: Fang is BIS melee stab weapon used everywhere. Lightbearer doubles spec regen rate, useful at every boss. Both are common-ish drops relative to other raid uniques.

content.text: Complete While Guthix Sleeps quest (requires many prerequisites including Defender of Varrock)

additionalContent.text: Note: Reward: fixed XP - 80k Thieving, 75k Farming, 75k Herblore, 50k Hunter, plus Slayer XP (Duradel's notes). One of the largest quest XP rewards in the game. Also unlocks Tormented Demons (Burning claws and the Purging Staff).

content.text: Complete Secrets of the North quest and farm Phantom Muspah

additionalContent.text: Note: Phantom Muspah drops the Ancient Sceptre upgrade and other useful items. Bowfa is very effective here.

content.text: Get 77 Herblore for Stamina Potions (if not already from WGS lamps)

additionalContent.text: Note: Stamina Potions are essential for efficient gameplay. If you used WGS lamps on Herblore you may already have this.

content.text: Complete Desert Treasure II quest

additionalContent.text: Note: Unlocks 4 new bosses: Vardorvis, The Leviathan, The Whisperer, Duke Sucellus. Each drops powerful rings and other uniques. Requires high combat stats and multiple quest prereqs.

content.text: Farm DT2 bosses: Vardorvis first for Ultor Ring + Soulreaper Axe

additionalContent.text: Note: Vardorvis is commonly the recommended first DT2 boss. It drops the Ultor vestige (made into the Ultor ring, BIS strength ring) and the Executioner's axe head (a Soulreaper Axe component). Do Vardorvis first, then the other DT2 bosses for the Bellator, Magus, and Venator vestiges.

content.text: GWD: Farm Bandos for melee armour, Armadyl for ranged armour

additionalContent.text: Note: With Bowfa + Crystal armour, Armadyl is very doable. Bandos can be done with Fang or melee setup. Priority: Bandos Chestplate + Tassets, then Armadyl Chestplate + Chainskirt.

content.text: Craft the Purging Staff from Tormented Demons (requires WGS completion)

additionalContent.text: Note: Tormented Demons drop the Burning claw (two combine into Burning claws, a strong spec weapon) and the Tormented synapse used to build the Purging Staff. (They do not drop Dragon Claws in OSRS.)

content.text: Fortis Colosseum for Dizana's Quiver (BIS ranged cape)

additionalContent.text: Note: The Colosseum is challenging wave-based content in Varlamore. Dizana's Quiver is the BIS ranged CAPE (it can hold ammunition but occupies the cape slot). Requires strong gear and high combat stats.

content.text: Nex masses for Torva armour

additionalContent.text: Note: Torva is BIS melee armour. Nex is best done in masses (large groups). Ancient Godsword spec helps with healing.

content.text: Chambers of Xeric for Twisted Bow, Dragon Hunter Crossbow, and other uniques

additionalContent.text: Note: CoX is the original OSRS raid. Twisted Bow is the most powerful ranged weapon. Also drops Kodai Wand, Dragon Claws, and Ancestral robes. Learn in trios or small teams.

content.text: Theatre of Blood for Scythe of Vitur, Rapier, and Sanguinesti Staff

additionalContent.text: Note: ToB drops some of the most powerful weapons in the game. Scythe is BIS for large monsters. Rapier is BIS melee stab. Sanguinesti Staff is a strong magic weapon with built-in healing.

content.text: Begin Yama farming for Oathplate armour (duo recommended, Surge potions are a priority)

additionalContent.text: Note: Yama is a 2025 boss that drops the Oathplate armour set (slash-focused melee) and the Soulflame Horn. Surge potions significantly help with the fight. Duo is recommended for ironmen.

content.text: Farm Doom of Mokhaiotl delves for Eye of Ayak and Avernic Treads (requires The Final Dawn quest)

additionalContent.text: Note: Doom of Mokhaiotl is accessed through delves after The Final Dawn quest. Eye of Ayak (83 Magic) is the fastest powered staff in the game at 3-tick speed - different niche from Tumeken's Shadow. Avernic Treads are multi-style endgame boots (+4 melee str, +2 ranged str, +1% magic dmg). Scale delve levels for better drop rates (1/2000 at level 3, improving to 1/540 at higher levels).

content.text: Continue ToA for Masori armour and Tumeken's Shadow

additionalContent.text: Note: Masori (f) is BIS ranged armour. Tumeken's Shadow is arguably the strongest magic weapon. Both are rarer drops so expect a longer grind.

content.text: Unlock Sailing via the Pandemonium quest - this is main-guide step 1.1.78a (Will & Anne on the Port Sarim docks). Everything below is the rest of the Sailing progression.

additionalContent.text: Note: Sailing is NOT required to finish the main guide. Do this track at your own pace. The five Sailing quests together grant 27,500 XP, which alone covers roughly to level 41 - so questing offsets most of the grind below 45.

content.text: Train Sailing to 12 via sea charting + courier tasks (~20 min)

additionalContent.text: Note: Pandemonium leaves you around level 4. Charting gives better XP than courier tasks - do courier runs on the way to charting objectives so both progress. Trimming sails and ocean encounters give some passive XP early.

content.text: Complete Prying Times (Sailing 12, Smithing 30, The Knight's Sword)

additionalContent.text: Note: Second Sailing quest; +800 Sailing XP. The Knight's Sword and 30 Smithing are already done from the main guide.

content.text: Train Sailing to 22 (Barracuda Trials unlock at 30 and are the fastest XP)

additionalContent.text: Note: ~40 min. Keep completing sea charting objectives for bonus region-completion XP.

content.text: Complete Current Affairs (Sailing 22, Fishing 10)

additionalContent.text: Note: Third Sailing quest; +1,400 Sailing XP.

content.text: Train Sailing to 45 via Barracuda Trials (~2-3 hours - good to chip away during Slayer downtime)

additionalContent.text: Note: Barracuda Trials from level 30 are the fastest method (~19k XP/hr at 30, scaling up). Charting objectives done in parallel shorten this.

content.text: Complete Troubled Tortugans (Sailing 45, plus 51 Slayer / 48 Construction / 45 Hunter / 40 Woodcutting / 34 Crafting)

additionalContent.text: Note: +10,000 Sailing XP. The 51 Slayer / 48 Construction requirements mean this naturally lands in your 2.0 endgame timeframe.

content.text: Complete The Red Reef (Sailing 52, Smithing 48)

additionalContent.text: Note: Fifth Sailing quest; +15,000 Sailing XP.

content.text: Build a teleport focus at Sailing 55 (needs 49 Construction) to unlock Sailing teleports

additionalContent.text: Note: Sailing teleports significantly improve travel. The greater teleport focus (75 Sailing, 69 Construction) enables the full Teleport to Boat spell.

content.text: Higher milestones: Gwenith Glide Barracuda Trial (72), Crystal Extractor (73), Rosewood Hull (93)

additionalContent.text: Note: The Gwenith Glide is a timed Barracuda Trial (requires Regicide). The Crystal Extractor (73) is a boat facility. The Rosewood Hull (93) is the best ship hull (~+20% speed).

content.text: Deep-sea trawling for Marlin -> Extended Stamina potions (85 Herblore + a marlin scale)

additionalContent.text: Note: Deep-sea trawling for marlin is one of the highest-earning skilling activities in the game. Marlin scales make Extended Stamina potions at 85 Herblore - useful for the whole account.
